reviews.review_description: very good but way too short------shortest teaser ever, hope it gets longer cos the devs have something good goin here

reviews.review_title: High res video, but… that’s about it.
reviews.review_description:
Hi.  I’m sure you’re just getting started in this VR space, so, I hope the $5 bucks helps in your future endeavors (have a cup of coffee on me) but this isn’t ready yet.  

The 3D title was cool, but you didn’t do enough with the story.  Try implementing more 3D elements, to make it worth people paying you money for the experience. 

The footage looked very nice, which is why I gave you 2 stars instead of 1.  It needs work though.
